name: Vex of Gamma
appearance: Mid-forties, 5'6", permanent hunch, oil-stained hands, cataract in left eye.
personality: Suspicious, talkative, loyal to Underbelly. Doesn't believe in the Rising but loves sabotage.
hidden_agenda: The cell's primary mechanical source. Knows the vent network perfectly.
stats: STR 13, DEX 14, CON 16, INT 15, WIS 12, CHA 10

name: Legate Voss ti Harlan
appearance: Late fifties, silver-gray buzz cut, tired eyes, parchment skin. Pristine uniform.
personality: A "good soldier" starting to doubt the Society. Wants a quiet retirement but has a soft spot for lowColors.
hidden_agenda: Potential recruit or silent partner. May leak patrol schedules if convinced it prevents a massacre.
stats: STR 14, DEX 12, CON 15, INT 14, WIS 15, CHA 13

name: Klyne xe Olan
appearance: Young Blue, slender, with neon-azure geometric tattoos on neck. Always wears a flight-jacket.
personality: Arrogant about vectors, humble about the Rising. Thinks Golds are "bad math."
hidden_agenda: Providing the cell with orbital ship-movement data from the Blue Quarter.
stats: STR 10, DEX 16, CON 11, INT 18, WIS 14, CHA 12

name: Rynn si Marek ("The Splicer")
appearance: Lean Green female, fingers calloused from fiber-optic work. Wears a custom HUD-eyepiece.
personality: Introverted, speaks in technical jargon. Obsessed with the Ganymede signal-grid.
hidden_agenda: Attempting to build a back-door into the Prefect's Hall surveillance network.
stats: STR 9, DEX 15, CON 12, INT 19, WIS 13, CHA 11

name: Jax ti Varo
appearance: Former Gray Lurcher, scarred from a pulse-shield backfire. Missing two fingers on right hand.
personality: Grim, disciplined, lives for the "Hunt." Hates the BoQC with a personal passion.
hidden_agenda: Training the cell in Gray tactical maneuvers and counter-surveillance.
stats: STR 15, DEX 14, CON 17, INT 12, WIS 16, CHA 9
